_comment: STAGING-ONLY, explicit, human-verified Neon->Cortex tenant map. NOT production truth. Contains NO secrets. Resolution is an EXACT integer org_id lookup only — no fuzzy matching. Any Neon organization_id not listed (or inactive) is REJECTED (fail-closed). PROMOTED 2026-06-04 to a verified staging-load seed: OWNER_A confirmed to exist in staging Cortex `users` (Supabase REST, count=1), and operator (Ishant) confirmed STAGING-TEST routing of Neon org 1 -> OWNER_A. This is deliberate test routing for the isolated staging Cortex DB only, NOT a claim of real-world ownership (Neon org email/gst are NULL, so no automatic match exists).

entries.notes: STAGING TEST ONLY. Human-confirmed routing of Neon org 1 to OWNER_A for isolated staging load proof. Not production truth.
